rationale: Gemini-3-flash-preview provided the most natural and professional translation. It correctly handled the asset paths (../), preserved the MDX structure, and captured the tone of the original text effectively. Specifically, it translated 'sink or swim' and 'pull a stunt' with appropriate Chinese idioms/expressions ('成败在此一举', '越级汇报的噱头') that fit the business context better than the more literal translations in other candidates.
